title: Statnett — Norwegian power system data
description: Operational data from Statnett, Norway's transmission system operator: power balance, power flow, production and consumption, grid frequency, and reservoir/hydrological context, available via a web download centre and a REST API for real-time topics (flow, balance, frequency). Relevant to the Nordic synchronous area (NO1-NO5). EDiT links only; Statnett hosts the data.

distribution.format: Web download centre + REST API (JSON), real-time topics
distribution.note: Web download centre plus a public REST API exposing real-time topics (power flow, balance, grid frequency). No single open licence is clearly stated on the site -- confirm reuse terms with Statnett before redistributing (hence the external-licence marker). NOTE: Statnett has flagged technical issues affecting power-flow and some historical data; for authoritative flow/historical series they direct users to the ENTSO-E Transparency Platform. Community Python client exists (statnett-api-client, MIT) but is unofficial.

variables: Real-time topics include power flow between price areas, system power balance, and grid frequency; download centre adds production, consumption and exchange series. Field definitions maintained upstream by Statnett.
